'''De-hoff Greenly''' was one of two sisters of [[Tag Greenley/Legends|Tag Greenley]]. She, like her other sibling [[Ta-mara Greenley|Ta-mara]], dated [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].

Lando had trouble double-booking them and Tag provided him with an alibi.

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], De-hoff was on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] dating Lando when she caught him with [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Krystal]]'s daughter. As a result, Tag fought in Lando's place in the [[Battle of Taanab/Legends|Battle of Taanab]] to cover his absence.
